rows.description: Computus Gul: Zaynter Rectoris secundo die Novembris 1711. ad eundem diem 1712.
rows.notes: Used gemini-flash's transcription as it is highly accurate to the image. gpt-5-mini's transcription contained multiple significant errors (e.g., 'Gt:', 'ac', 'underwritten' instead of 'Gul:', 'secundo die', 'eundem'). This decision was made by visual verification.
rows.section_header: Computus Gul: Zaynter Rectoris secundo die Novembris 1711. ad eundem diem 1712.

rows.description: Imprimis reddidit computum de remanent? in Cista – 39 10s4d
rows.notes: Used gemini-flash. Visual verification confirms that the amount '39 10s4d' is embedded in the description text and not aligned to the monetary columns. gpt-5-mini incorrectly attempted to extract structured amounts (39/11/10.5) and misread parts of the description. This decision was made by visual verification.
rows.section_header: Imprimis reddidit computum de remanent? in Cista – 39 10s4d

rows.notes: This row was present in gemini-flash and confirmed visually on the ledger page as a distinct header. gpt-5-mini omitted this row, resulting in a mis-alignment for subsequent entries.

Amounts (60/0/0) were agreed by both extractors and visually confirmed as accurate. Used gemini-flash's description ('Guinear'), which is accurate. gpt-5-mini misread the description ('Gunner de Arreagivs').
rows.english_description: Arrears received from Guinear (tenant/account).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Arrears received from Guinear, amounting to £60 0s 0d.

rows.notes: Used gemini-flash. Visual verification confirms the description 'Longwitnam & Mich.' is accurate, and the fraction symbol after pence is a 'q', correctly interpreted as 0.25 (a farthing). gpt-5-mini misread the description ('Longbourn pro Mich.') and incorrectly identified the fraction as 0.5 ('halfpenny loop'). This decision was made by visual verification.
